title: [test-bulk-operation-endpoints] Aggregate failure: test bulk operation endpoints (10/11 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 11 'test bulk operation endpoints' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-test-bulk-operation-endpoints] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0 (undocumented)
expected: All 11 'test bulk operation endpoints' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that exercises each documented bulk-capable endpoint in agent-foundry/data/openapi.json against http://localhost:8899 with a multi-item payload, capturing per-item results.
3. Assert the documented all-or-nothing / per-item semantics and read back each item to confirm it was applied.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/test-bulk-operation-endpoints/cases.json — this run recorded 10 of 11 checks failing.
